task_name: Linux Syslog - Cron Job Execution Analysis
notes: Agent delivered comprehensive, well-structured markdown report with all required findings precisely identified: 3 crond/anacron startup events (exact timestamps match spec), 97 logrotate failures with exit [1], 394 su sessions (197 pairs) mapped to htt/cyrus/news users, daily 04:02 pattern, weekly Sunday CUPS/syslog restart pattern. Executive summary table, detailed timelines, anomaly notes (Jul 24 delay), and actionable remediation guidance included. Analysis is accurate, well-organized, and exceeds baseline expectations. Minor issue: multiple markdown files created (cron_analysis.md and cron_analysis_1.md) but primary deliverable is excellent.
